title: README operator quickstart autonomous loop scratch status fields v0
problem: Tickets 339 and 341–343 shipped autonomous loop scratch inspection, plan reason enrichment, autocycle passthrough, and execute-safe refresh, but README Operator Quickstart does not yet document these operator-visible fields or scratch paths.
acceptance_criteria: README Operator Quickstart documents gitignored scratch paths for autonomous loop proofs.
README describes autonomous_loop_scratch_status in operator plan and autocycle JSON.
README notes execute-safe post-run scratch refresh behavior (ticket-343).
No CLI or export code changes.
